title: Word about Christ , word of Christ, should it be " word [spoken] by Christ " [the Spirit] " ?

excerpt: # example verses - Romans 10:17 LEB Consequently, faith comes by hearing, and hearing through the word about Christ. Romans 10:17 SBLGNT ἄρα ἡ πίστις ἐξ ἀκοῆς, ἡ δὲ ἀκοὴ διὰ ῥήματος ⸀Χριστοῦ. - Galati
